laws.details: Driving by a person under the influence of alcohol or drugs exceeding 30mg per 100ml of blood.
laws.recommendation: Never drink and drive. Use a designated driver or cab service.

laws.details: Exceeding the speed limit prescribed for Light Motor Vehicles.
laws.recommendation: Always adhere to posted speed limits. Speed kills.

laws.details: Exceeding the speed limit prescribed for Medium or Heavy Vehicles.
laws.recommendation: Maintain safe speeds, especially with heavier loads.

laws.details: Driving a vehicle without a valid driving license.
laws.recommendation: Always carry your original driving license or a digital copy on mParivahan/DigiLocker.

laws.details: Driving in a manner which is dangerous to the public (e.g., jumping red lights, zig-zag driving).
laws.recommendation: Drive predictably and follow all traffic signals.

laws.details: Using a handheld communications device while driving.
laws.recommendation: Use hands-free systems only for emergencies, or pull over safely before using your phone.

laws.fine: ₹1,000 and Disqualification of license for 3 months
laws.details: Driving or riding a two-wheeler without a protective headgear.
laws.recommendation: Always wear an ISI-marked helmet and strap it properly.

laws.details: Driving without wearing a safety belt or carrying passengers not wearing seat belts.
laws.recommendation: Seat belts save lives. Ensure every passenger is buckled up.

laws.fine: ₹1,000 and Disqualification of license for 3 months
laws.details: Riding a two-wheeler with more than two persons (including the driver).
laws.recommendation: Two-wheelers are designed for two people only. Overloading affects balance.

laws.details: Driving a vehicle without a valid third-party insurance.
laws.recommendation: Renew your insurance on time to avoid heavy fines and legal liabilities.

laws.details: Participating in or allowing an unauthorized race or speed trial on public roads.
laws.recommendation: Roads are not race tracks. Keep speed trials to authorized circuits.

laws.details: Failure to draw to the side of the road to allow free passage to ambulances, fire tenders, etc.
laws.recommendation: Always prioritize emergency vehicles. A few seconds can save a life.

laws.details: Offenses committed by juveniles. Registration of vehicle canceled for 12 months. Juvenile ineligible for license till age 25.
laws.recommendation: Ensure minors do not drive. It carries extreme penalties for the guardian.
